title: Finland warns end of Ukraine war could bring more Russian spying
summary_full: 'Russian intelligence capacity in Europe has suffered due to the war, and Russia is preparing to restore this capacity,' the Finnish Security and Intelligence Service said on Tuesday
summary_public: 'Russian intelligence capacity in Europe has suffered due to the war, and Russia is preparing to restore this capacity,' the Finnish Security and Intelligence Service said on Tuesday

FI.label: positive
FI.evidence: Finland warns end of Ukraine war could bring more Russian spying
